title: GTM Associate, Europe (Founding Go-to-Market Associate)
office_cadence_note: Ashby posting-api (ramp board): workplaceType='OnSite', isRemote=false, location='London'. The JD body states NO day-count and no explicit in-person mandate; it does say 'This is one of the first roles on the ground in London' + 'establish the culture' + frequent UK/Europe travel. Ramp's own careers page describes 'a combination of remote and on-site work... offices available to those who want to come in, whenever they want', and London is a brand-new office with no published RTO mandate. Net: cadence UNSTATED but workplaceType=OnSite + founding 'on the ground' framing lean IN-OFFICE-HEAVY — verify directly before relying on it. Verified 2026-06-10.
working_week_note: RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-11 against the user's ACTUAL dealbreaker (weekend/6-7-day work only). Ashby posting-api workplaceType='OnSite', isRemote=false; JD body states NO day-count and NO mention of weekends, Saturday, Sunday, or a 6/7-day week. 'OnSite' + 'first on the ground' framing implies in-office presence but NOT weekend work. Default to a standard Mon-Fri week. FINE — NOT a dealbreaker. (Note: heavy UK/Europe travel is part of this GTM role, but travel is not weekend-work; confirm cadence directly.)
momentum_flag: Ramp is one of the fastest-growing fintechs globally ($200B+ annualized spend, 70k+ companies); aggressive Europe expansion with London as new European HQ; very well-funded, builder culture, explicitly hiring first-on-ground founding roles.
biggest_lever: Explicit 'Founding GTM Associate, first role on the ground in London, build from zero, embrace ambiguity, own outcomes' framing + 'AI fluency as a daily habit' (Ryan's Claude Code agent-building) + 'slope over intercept, care less where you trained' — directly rewards his lived 0->1 first-employee operator spike and AI-native habit over pedigree.
biggest_risk: Role leans hard on outbound B2B sales mechanics (cold account lists, outbound sequences, SQL conversion, multi-threading CFOs) — Ryan's GTM is community-led/presale/PR, NOT enterprise outbound sales. Fintech (spend management) is outside his crypto/AI-tooling domain. UK RTW satisfied, no degree/SWE gate (positives).
apply_move: Lead with the founding-operator narrative: first employee 1->30 at Minima, turned ambiguous founder priorities into workstreams, $4.5m community-led presale (15x ROI on $300k) and $6.5m Series A investor events as proof of 'build from zero + own outcomes'. Reframe community-led GTM as repeatable demand generation. Show Claude Code agents as the 'reach for AI before doing it manually' proof. Address the outbound-sales gap head-on with the presale revenue ownership.
agentic: AI-powered fintech (builder culture, AI-fluency-required), not an AI-agent product company
